tiers.name: Web Dasher
tiers.description: This badge is earned by beating 5 list levels.

tiers.name: Web Grinder
tiers.description: This badge is earned by beating 20 list levels.

tiers.name: Web Menace
tiers.description: This badge is earned by beating 75 list levels.

tiers.name: Web Destroyer
tiers.description: This badge is earned by beating all 150 list levels. You are insane :)

tiers.name: Verifier
tiers.description: This badge is earned by verifying a level that's placed on the list.

tiers.name: Verifier
tiers.description: This badge is earned by verifying 5 levels that are placed on the list.

tiers.name: Serial Verifier
tiers.description: This badge is earned by verifying 20 levels that are placed on the list.

tiers.name: Top 25 Victor
tiers.description: This badge is earned by completing a top 25 level.

tiers.name: Top 10 Victor
tiers.description: This badge is earned by completing a top 10 level.

tiers.name: Top 1 Victor
tiers.description: This badge is earned by completing a top 1 level.

tiers.name: Champion
tiers.description: This badge is earned by reaching the #1 spot on the leaderboard.

tiers.name: Master Champion
tiers.description: This badge is earned by holding the #1 spot on the leaderboard for a total of 7 days.

tiers.name: Godly Champion
tiers.description: This badge is earned by holding the #1 spot on the leaderboard for a total of 30 days.

tiers.name: Contributor
tiers.description: This special badge is granted to those who contribute to the WBDL website in one way or another. Thank you!

tiers.name: Certified Oldgen
tiers.description: This badge was awarded to everyone who joined WBDL within a week of the release.

tiers.name: Community Member
tiers.description: This badge is earned by joining the WBDL discord server.

tiers.name: Eternal Badge
tiers.description: This badge was awarded to the winner of the Eternal Door contest held in June 2026.
